3.2.1. TÜBİTAK- TEYDEB 1505 University & Industry Collaboration Support Program

Duration:

2 years

Deadline:

Rolling

Budget:

In case the customer is in SME scale, 75% of the project budget included in the support is covered by TÜBİTAK and the remaining 25% by the customer. In case the client organization is large-scale at the project application date, 60% of the project budget included in the support is covered by TÜBİTAK and the remaining 40% by the customer. The portion of the project budget to be covered by TÜBİTAK is limited to 2.000.000 TL.

Content:

https://tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/sanayi/ulusal-destek-programlari/1505-universite-sanayi-isbirligi-destek-programi
